summary: Phase 2.1 Bearer-token auth migration regression. All 13 prior pytest cases still pass + added 2 new tests covering Authorization: Bearer header on /api/trips/generate and /api/trips. Code-reviewed /api/auth/session — already returns session_token in body (line 218). Frontend sanity verified for /, /trips, /chat, /auth/login + Google redirect target on https://journey-screens.preview.emergentagent.com.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /auth/session correctly returns {user, trips_claimed, session_token} (line 218) — Phase 2.1 contract intact. Cookie is also still set (line 198) so cookie+header dual support is preserved.

server.py get_current_user() reads token from cookie OR Authorization: Bearer header — works as designed; tested via test_auth_me_with_seeded_session, test_trips_list_authed_bearer, test_generate_trip_authed_bearer.

frontend api.js: axios interceptor injects Authorization: Bearer <token> from localStorage on every request — clean implementation. AuthCallback (auth.jsx line 96) stores resp.data.session_token correctly.
auth.jsx refresh() short-circuits when no token exists (avoids spurious 401 on every page load for unauthed users) — good.
Minor: session_token TTL on backend (7 days) is enforced via expires_at check, but frontend has no client-side expiry awareness — it relies on backend 401s to detect expiry; acceptable.
Server still uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') (FastAPI lifespan recommended) — non-blocking.
trips/generate response trip['cover'] is now None (good fix from prior iteration's deprecated source.unsplash.com).
test_credentials: Auth tested via mongosh-seeded user_sessions row + Authorization: Bearer header (per /app/auth_testing.md). No real Google account used.
seed_data_creation: session-scoped fixture seed_session inserts a transient user + session_token into MongoDB (test_database.users + test_database.user_sessions) and cleans up on teardown. Generated trips for both guest and authed flows are also cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2.1 Bearer-token migration is complete and verified end-to-end. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_memento_api.py -v` (15 tests, ~60s, includes 2 real Gemini 3 Pro LLM calls). Frontend: clicking 'Continue with Google' on /auth/login correctly navigates to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=...%2Ftrips. The /api/auth/session endpoint cannot be live-tested with bogus/injected session_id because it always calls Emergent's oauth/session-data endpoint — but the response shape (session_token in body) is verified via code inspection (server.py line 218). The frontend AuthCallback correctly reads resp.data.session_token and persists it to localStorage via setToken().
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA. All Phase 2.1 regression checks green.
